rows.label: tev032701_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire

rows.label: tev032701_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask Bihabba about humans.

rows.label: tev032701_JNK0020
rows.name: Discuss

rows.label: tev032701_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask Bihabba about recent developments.

rows.label: tev032701_SEL0031
rows.name:
Ask Bihabba about the Doll
discovered in Nightglow Forest.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev032701_SEL0041
rows.name:
Ask Bihabba about the
Doll the Growth took.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev032701_SEL0051
rows.name:
Ask Bihabba about the people
living on the Ma-non ship.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev032701_SEL0061
rows.name:
Ask Bihabba about the final
battle in the Central Life.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev032701_SEL1011
rows.name: Ask Bihabba about humans.

rows.label: tev032701_SEL1021
rows.name: Ask Bihabba about recent developments.

rows.label: tev032701_MSG0001
rows.name:
We've been around numerous galaxies,
but this is the first time we've met
anything like you, you know?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev032701_MSG0002
rows.name:
You're all made of machines, right?! And you make all
this this weird food! And your clothes are so... Well,
it's all just very very unfamiliar, you see?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev032701_MSG0003
rows.name:
Anyway, we're going to enjoy studying a pack
of walking, talking mysteries like you, won't
we? I hope you enjoy it as well, okay?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev032701_MSG0008
rows.name:
We Ma-non are busting out our
skills to help you guys out
here on on Mira, aren't we?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev032701_MSG0009
rows.name:
We even started that Candid &
Credible operation to supply
you with weapons, did we not?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev032701_MSG0010
rows.name:
And some folks like Heradot are fixing
up the ship so we can head back into
space when the time is right, you know?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev032701_MSG0011
rows.name:
...What, me? Oh, I'm not as handy with machines as
other Ma-non, so I'm sort of keeping an eye on them.
Just to make sure no one gets hurt, you understand?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev032701_MSG0016
rows.name:
Oh, you found a Doll that the
Growth were trying to to get their
grubby claws on? That's great![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev032701_MSG0017
rows.name:
If they were trying that hard to get it despite
already having so many dangerous Dolls to begin
with, then the writing's on the wall, isn't it?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev032701_MSG0018
rows.name:
That thing is clearly bad news,
wouldn't you say? Probably
worse than we even know...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev032701_MSG0019
rows.name:
Anyway, maybe think twice before you get
in there and start tinkering with it?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev032701_MSG0025
rows.name:
Wouldn't you agree that Doll is a nightmare waiting
to happen? It wouldn't surprise me if it's powerful
enough to obliterate the whole planet...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev032701_MSG0026
rows.name:
I mean, it's the Growth's, right? And just look what
they did to get it back. I don't think you spend that
much effort unless it's for something really important.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev032701_MSG0027
rows.name:
It's gone now, but we need to be ready for
whatever horrible surprise that thing is
holding in store for us, wouldn't you agree?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev032701_MSG0035
rows.name:
Did the Growth really get one of your own
people to double-cross you? We've been in
a a panic since we first heard the news.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev032701_MSG0036
rows.name:
If they got one human to do it, then
someone could likely just march in here
and blow up our ship, couldn't they?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev032701_MSG0037
rows.name:
It's bad enough that some Ma-non
are proposing we bar all humans
from entering the ship, you know?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev032701_MSG0038
rows.name:
Anyway, things are pretty chaotic
on the ship now, so I hope we
do something really soon...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev032701_MSG0045
rows.name:
At least that Zu Pharg monstrosity
is out of the picture, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev032701_MSG0046
rows.name:
But still, the Growth are going to
pull out all the stops now that the
endgame is approaching, aren't they?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev032701_MSG0047
rows.name:
Don't forget that they've still got that
mysterious Doll they stole, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev032701_MSG0048
rows.name:
Anyway, you'll need to be super extra careful
out there, I imagine? Now go get those real
bodies of yours and come back safe.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev032701_MSG1001
rows.name:
You've taken care of the Growth,
and we've mostly wrapped up
repairs to to our ship...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev032701_MSG1002
rows.name:
We also all had a talk, and I think
we're all getting ready to to to
head back out to space, all right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev032701_MSG1003
rows.name:
...What's that? Come back soon?
You're going to miss us?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev032701_MSG1004
rows.name:
Well, uh... Don't worry, I suppose? We'll
head back to to NLA just as soon as we
finish our research expedition, all right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev032701_MSG1005
rows.name:
I mean, you've basically changed the fate of our
race by making us hopeless pizza addicts, so who
knows what will happen if we don't return?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev032701_MSG1010
rows.name:
Now that we don't have to worry about death
from above, Heradot decided to enjoy a
pizza up on top of the ship, you know?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev032701_MSG1011
rows.name:
Everything was going great
until she dropped her last
slice of pepperoni. But then...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev032701_MSG1012
rows.name:
Well, then she took a flying
leap right off the ship to try
and catch it! Can you imagine?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev032701_MSG1013
rows.name:
I thought she was done for, but she nabbed the slice
in midair, did a double somersault, and and splashed
down in the water safe and sound! That's good, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev032701_MSG1014
rows.name: Talk about amazing reflexes, am I right?[ST:wait ]
